vocab.example: I often use the privacy of my car to practice vocal exercises or sing along to my favorite tracks during a gridlock.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian đứng yên (không di chuyển)
vocab.example: I utilize the stationary periods to check my physical posture and do some light stretching in the driver's seat.

vocab.meaning: duy trì sự nhận biết về tình hình xung quanh
vocab.example: Even when stuck, it's vital to maintain situational awareness to react promptly once the traffic begins to thin out.
If I'm a passenger, a traffic jam is the perfect excuse to dive into some high-quality audio-visual entertainment on my tablet.

vocab.meaning: người quan sát bất đắc dĩ (bị kẹt lại một chỗ)
vocab.example: Being a captive observer of people in neighboring cars can actually be quite an amusing way to pass the time.

vocab.meaning: gánh nặng nhận thức/áp lực trí não
vocab.example: To reduce the cognitive load of driving in heavy traffic, I switch from complex podcasts to light, instrumental music.

vocab.meaning: quan sát và cảm nhận môi trường xung quanh
vocab.example: I sometimes take a moment to simply absorb the surroundings and appreciate the urban architecture that I usually zoom past.
When the vehicle is completely halted, I find myself starting to daydream aimlessly about my next vacation.
A traffic standstill provides a quiet gap in my day to internalize information from an educational lecture I've been listening to.

vocab.meaning: kiềm chế cơn ngáp (vì buồn chán hoặc mệt)
vocab.example: While others might be fuming, I usually just stifle a yawn and wait patiently for the lane to clear.
